meta.name: Freight Cost Calculator
meta.description: Industrial-grade freight cost analysis tool incorporating ISO 9001, Lean, Six Sigma, and WERC standards for total landed cost, waste identification, and continuous improvement.

inputs.label: Shipment Weight (kg)
inputs.businessContext: Total weight of the shipment, including packaging. Used for rate base and dimensional weight calculations.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total weight of the shipment, including packaging. Used for rate base and dimensional weight calculations.

inputs.label: Shipment Volume (cbm)
inputs.businessContext: Total cubic meters of the shipment. Used for dimensional weight factor and space utilization analysis.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total cubic meters of the shipment. Used for dimensional weight factor and space utilization analysis.

inputs.label: Distance (km)
inputs.businessContext: Total transport distance from origin to destination. Influences fuel surcharge and time-based costs.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total transport distance from origin to destination. Influences fuel surcharge and time-based costs.

inputs.label: Transport Mode
inputs.businessContext: Mode of transport. Each mode has distinct cost structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

businessContext_i18n.en: Mode of transport. Each mode has distinct cost structures, risk profiles, and carbon impact.

inputs.label: Fuel Surcharge (%)
inputs.businessContext: Percentage applied to base freight rate to account for fuel price variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage applied to base freight rate to account for fuel price variability. Typically indexed to DOE or IATA.

inputs.label: Accessorial Charges (USD)
inputs.businessContext: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

businessContext_i18n.en: Additional fees for liftgate, residential delivery, inside delivery, detention, etc.

inputs.label: Density Factor (kg/cbm)
inputs.businessContext: Actual density of the shipment. Used to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable weight.

businessContext_i18n.en: Actual density of the shipment. Used to compare against breakpoints for LTL class or airfreight chargeable weight.

inputs.label: Hazardous Material
inputs.businessContext: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

businessContext_i18n.en: Indicates if shipment contains dangerous goods. Triggers additional compliance and handling fees.

inputs.label: Expedited Service
inputs.businessContext: If true, applies a premium multiplier for time-definite delivery.

businessContext_i18n.en: If true, applies a premium multiplier for time-definite delivery.

rules.message: Both weight and volume must be positive for dimensional weight calculation.
Density factor must be between 10 and 5000 kg/cbm.
Air freight recommended for distances > 3000 km. Consider ocean for cost efficiency.
Hazardous materials by air require IATA DGR compliance and may be restricted.

thresholds.message: Fuel surcharge exceeds 25% — consider fuel hedging or modal shift.
Low density shipment — potential for dimensional weight penalty. Re-evaluate packaging.
Accessorial charges > $500 — audit for unnecessary services.

formulas.name: Dimensional Weight (kg)
formulas.description: Chargeable weight based on volume and a standard divisor (ISO/ IATA).

formulas.name: Chargeable Weight (kg)
formulas.description: The greater of actual weight and dimensional weight (Six Sigma: CTQ metric).

formulas.name: Base Freight Rate (USD/kg)
formulas.description: Rate per kg based on transport mode and distance (WERC benchmarking).
formulas.formula: CASE transport_mode WHEN 'FTL' THEN 0.12 WHEN 'LTL' THEN 0.25 WHEN 'Air' THEN 2.50 WHEN 'Rail' THEN 0.08 WHEN 'Ocean' THEN 0.04 ELSE 0.15 END

formulas.name: Fuel Surcharge Amount (USD)
formulas.description: Fuel surcharge applied to base freight cost.

formulas.name: Hazardous Material Premium (USD)
formulas.description: Additional fee for hazardous goods handling (Lean: waste of non-value-add compliance).

formulas.name: Expedite Multiplier
formulas.description: Premium for expedited service (time-based cost driver).

formulas.name: Total Freight Cost (USD)
formulas.description: Primary result: total landed freight cost including all surcharges and accessorials.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Empty Miles Factor
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Estimated percentage of empty return miles (Lean Muda: transportation waste).
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Increases cost per kg by up to 15% if not backhauled.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Dwell Time (hours)
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Average time spent at loading/unloading beyond free time (Six Sigma: cycle time waste).
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Detention charges and reduced asset utilization.

hiddenLossDrivers.label: Packaging Inefficiency
hiddenLossDrivers.description: Ratio of void fill to product volume (Lean: overprocessing waste).
hiddenLossDrivers.impact: Increases dimensional weight and material cost.

suggestedActions.label: Consolidate Shipments
suggestedActions.description: Combine LTL shipments to achieve FTL rates. Potential savings: 20-30%.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Reduce base freight rate per kg.

suggestedActions.label: Optimize Packaging Density
suggestedActions.description: Reduce void fill to increase density factor above 100 kg/cbm. Avoids dimensional weight penalties.
suggestedActions.expectedImpact: Lower chargeable weight by up to 40%.

suggestedActions.label: Audit Accessorial Charges
suggestedActions.description: Review accessorial fees for errors or unnecessary services. Implement Lean Kaizen.

suggestedActions.label: Evaluate Modal Shift
suggestedActions.description: For distances > 1000 km, consider intermodal rail to reduce cost and carbon footprint.
